question: Company A sells a board game. According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year has the lowest copies sold in the entire period.
options.B: The latest year shows a sharp decline in copies sold compared to previous years.
options.C: Copies sold per year has been steadily decreasing throughout the entire period.
options.D: No firm conclusion about the full-year trend in the latest year can be drawn from this chart.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (893 copies) directly to full-year values like 2,626 copies creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
